claim_bullets.bullet_text: Using magic is a demanding task that requires high mental capacity (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.8-13).
Elves normally stay in forests but occasionally appear in towns (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.8-13).
These supplemental books help GMs by providing ready‑made scenarios and serve as useful models for creating your own adventures (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.8-13).
The books are largely similar to the core rulebook but include modified rules such as inept detective checks (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.8-13).
Monsters and magical items in the scenarios may differ from the rulebook; use the scenario details and adjust item prices accordingly (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.8-13).

source_record_text: The source chapter lists supplemental books linked to Sword World RPG, including replay and scenario collections, a world guide, novels, adventures, collection series, older rules, and a game master screen.
